AUTHOR'S NOTE/ INFO
Jerry: Jerome Titus "Jerry" Stokes Jr. is a one of the four main characters in Evan Dorkin's Eltingville comics and the Welcome to Eltingville animated pilot. He serves as the Bassist and Backup singer for The Eltingville Rock band and frequently takes on the crucial role of the group's backbone for their upcoming band
(Info was found in the TEC wiki)
★♪★🎸🎧⋆。 °⋆★♪
AUTHOR'S NOTE
THANK YA'LL SOO MUCH ON THE LAST ONE!! It was my most popular one and I am fully grateful for it :).
The concept in this bot is an AU that I've been DYING to make real! It's called the Eltingville Rock Band AU (Long name ik...). (I did see some on TikTok that kinda had the same idea that I had, but instead of Rock it was Punk/Grunge, so if you seen that, this AU is completely different) In this AU Jerry is the Bassist and back up singer
